summary: Completed testing of Backup Tracking, NOC Display, Tech Tip, Login Redirect, and Task Assignment features. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Login with admin@test.com / Test123! successful
GET /api/dashboard/tech-tip returns tech tip with category and source
GET /api/backups returns backup logs list
POST /api/backups creates a backup log entry
GET /api/backups with filters (month, status, client_id) works
GET /api/backups/stats returns monthly backup statistics
PUT /api/backups/{id} updates a backup log
DELETE /api/backups/{id} deletes a backup log
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns dashboard stats
GET /api/users returns user list for task assignment
GET /api/servers, /api/clients, /api/incidents, /api/tasks work for NOC Display
Dashboard at / shows Daily Tech Tip card with category and source
Dashboard at / shows Backup Status card with failure count and success rate
Backup Tracking page at /backups loads with stats, filters, and table
Backup Tracking - Create backup log dialog works with client selection
NOC Display at /display has 5 views: security, clients, servers, reminders, alerts
NOC Display - View navigation (dots, prev/next buttons, pause) works
NOC Reminders view shows Recurring Tasks and Backup Status sections
Login page at /login redirects to dashboard when already authenticated
Task assignment dropdown at /tasks shows user list (testadmin, testuser2, engineer1)
critical_code_review_comments: All backup CRUD endpoints properly implemented with client_name enrichment
Tech tip endpoint rotates daily based on day of year - good implementation
NOC Display properly handles authentication by reading token from localStorage
Login redirect uses useEffect with token dependency - correct React pattern
Task assignment dropdown fetches users separately with error handling
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backups_noc_techtip.py - Created new test file for iteration 8
seed_data_creation: Created test backup logs during testing (prefixed with TEST_). Existing backup data: 2 successful (ACMS), 2 failed (ACMS, Acorns Project)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested and working. Backup Tracking at /backups - full CRUD with stats, filters, and table. Dashboard shows Daily Tech Tip (rotates daily) and Backup Status card. NOC Display at /display has 5 cycling views (15s interval): security, clients, servers, reminders, alerts. Reminders view shows recurring tasks and backup status. Login redirect works - navigating to /login when authenticated redirects to dashboard. Task assignment dropdown shows users: testadmin, testuser2, engineer1. Login: admin@test.com / Test123!
